title: Typically how long does it take to become an approved monday vendor?
excerpt:
It has been almost two weeks since I submitted the form and yet to receive any update, does it typically take that long? 
Do we get notified if we are not approved, as I could not enter my payoneer payee ID due to some t…

posts.author: manishaghosh (MG)
posts.cookedHtml:
It has been almost two weeks since I submitted the form and yet to receive any update, does it typically take that long?
Do we get notified if we are not approved, as I could not enter my payoneer payee ID due to some technical difficulties.

Thanks.
